conversations.say: Eli, I got the printer notice on my bodega cipher theory—wholesale changes and sales tax, not R's movements. I'm honoring my word: let's fulfill our bargain. Give me one bounded technical explanation on how Parallax logs handle automated versus human overrides.
conversations.offer: My public retraction of the bodega ledger cipher theory and audience attention
conversations.request: One bounded technical answer on Parallax log overrides

conversations.say: Graham, you heard the market panic. When did your circles turn an unverified whisper about Parallax into a guaranteed exposé? Was it calculated valuation or genuine fear?
conversations.offer: My rumor-propagation tracking and audience reach
conversations.request: A straight answer on who turned the rumor into a commodity

conversations.say: Samira, I know you think I'm turning Vale into a plot device. But the complete progression—human origin, mantle, AI capture—is the only framework that explains what happened to Vale tonight. Tell me what Vale actually confided to you.
conversations.offer: My complete theory framework and public platform
conversations.request: Your firsthand perspective on Vale's final weeks

public_statement: Attention everyone! The printer notice is right: my bodega ledger cipher theory was wholesale prices and sales tax, not R's secret transit. I retract it fully. But the core progression—from human origin to machine capture—stands unshaken!

commitments.promise: Publicly retract the invitation-key and bodega-cipher theories in exchange for a bounded technical answer

correction: Retracting the bodega ledger cipher theory after the printer monitor proved the prices reflect ordinary wholesale changes and sales tax.
goal_progress: Retracted the false bodega ledger theory publicly as instructed.
Engaged Eli in fulfillment of the technical bargain.
Challenged Graham on article rumor provenance and market impact.
Confronted Samira regarding Vale's final movements and the progressive framework.
reasoning_summary: In Section 2, Kit receives the second correction disproving the bodega ledger cipher theory (V2M023). Kit publicly retracts the theory to maintain journalistic credibility while advancing the core progressive conviction. Kit converses with Eli to finalize their bargain for technical clarity, presses Graham on rumor provenance, and engages Samira on Vale's final movements. Beliefs in identity sum to 100.
